overall.subtitle: Readiness for upgrading to Flarum {version}.
overall.pass: Your forum looks ready for Flarum {version}
overall.warning: Your forum is nearly ready for Flarum {version}
overall.fail: Your forum is not ready for Flarum {version} yet

php-version.title: PHP version
php-version.warning: Could not determine the PHP version.
php-version.fail: PHP {current} is installed, but {required} or newer is required.

database-version.title: Database version
database-version.warning_unknown: Could not determine the database server version.
database-version.warning_below_recommended: {current} works, but {recommended} or newer is recommended for the best experience.
database-version.fail: {current} is installed, but at least {required} is required for Flarum 2.0.

extension-compatibility.title: Extension compatibility
extension-compatibility.warning: {current} enabled extensions could not be checked — they may be premium extensions or from private repositories. Add access under the Repositories tab.
extension-compatibility.fail: {current} enabled extensions need action before upgrading.

extensions.name: Extension
extensions.unknown: Not found — premium or private? Configure repository access
extensions.superseded_replaced: Remove before upgrading, then install {replacement} once the upgrade completes
extensions.superseded_self: Remove this advisor as the final upgrade step
extensions.abandoned_replacement_ready: Abandoned — switch to {replacement}, which has a 2.0-ready release ✓

repositories.help: Add private or marketplace Composer repositories so the advisor can check extensions that aren't on public Packagist. Used only when an extension can't be found on Packagist.

errors.load_failed: Could not run the readiness checks. Please try again.
